'''âk-f-l''' ('''kakafal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:starboard|starboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:starboard|starboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| kakafal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikafal|thikafal]] || [[word:jikafal|jikafal]] || [[word:shikafal|shikafal]] || [[word:kikafal|kikafal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukafal|thuthukafal]] || [[word:jujukafal|jujukafal]] || [[word:shushukafal|shushukafal]] || [[word:kukukafal|kukukafal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukafal|thukafal]] || [[word:jukafal|jukafal]] || [[word:shukafal|shukafal]] || [[word:kukafal|kukafal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukafal|thukafal]] || [[word:jukafal|jukafal]] || [[word:shukafal|shukafal]] || [[word:kukafal|kukafal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekafal|thekafal]] || [[word:jekafal|jekafal]] || [[word:shekafal|shekafal]] || [[word:kekafal|kekafal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokafal|thothokafal]] || [[word:jojokafal|jojokafal]] || [[word:shoshokafal|shoshokafal]] || [[word:kokokafal|kokokafal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokafal|thokafal]] || [[word:jokafal|jokafal]] || [[word:shokafal|shokafal]] || [[word:kokafal|kokafal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokafal|thokafal]] || [[word:jokafal|jokafal]] || [[word:shokafal|shokafal]] || [[word:kokafal|kokafal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkafal|thĂŠkafal]] || [[word:jĂŠkafal|jĂŠkafal]] || [[word:shĂŠkafal|shĂŠkafal]] || [[word:kĂŠkafal|kĂŠkafal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakafal|thathakafal]] || [[word:jajakafal|jajakafal]] || [[word:shashakafal|shashakafal]] || [[word:kakakafal|kakakafal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakafal|thakafal]] || [[word:jakafal|jakafal]] || [[word:shakafal|shakafal]] || [[word:kakafal|kakafal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakafal|thakafal]] || [[word:jakafal|jakafal]] || [[word:shakafal|shakafal]] || [[word:kakafal|kakafal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakafal|shakafal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakafal|goshakafal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakafal|gokishakafal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakafalnĂŒ|shakafalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakafalnknĂŒ|goshakafalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakafalnĂŒ|gokishakafalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakafalshĂ«|shakafalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakafalnkshĂ«|goshakafalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakafalshĂ«|gokishakafalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakafalro|shakafalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakafalnkro|goshakafalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakafalro|gokishakafalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakafalmu|shakafalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakafalnkmu|goshakafalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakafalmu|gokishakafalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakafalsher|shakafalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakafalnksher|goshakafalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakafalsher|gokishakafalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakafalng|shakafalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakafalnkng|goshakafalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakafalng|gokishakafalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakafalya|shakafalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakafalnkya|goshakafalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakafalya|gokishakafalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakafalyam|shakafalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakafalnkyam|goshakafalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakafalyam|gokishakafalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakafalnĂŒshĂ«|shakafalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakafalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakafalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakafalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakafalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakafalnĂŒro|shakafalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakafalnknĂŒro|goshakafalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakafalnĂŒro|gokishakafalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakafalnĂŒmu|shakafalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakafalnknĂŒmu|goshakafalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakafalnĂŒmu|gokishakafalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakafalshĂ«nĂŒ|shakafalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakafalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakafalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakafalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakafalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakafalshĂ«ro|shakafalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakafalnkshĂ«ro|goshakafalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakafalshĂ«ro|gokishakafalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakafalshĂ«mu|shakafalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakafalnkshĂ«mu|goshakafalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakafalshĂ«mu|gokishakafalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakafalronĂŒ|shakafalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakafalnkronĂŒ|goshakafalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakafalronĂŒ|gokishakafalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakafalroshĂ«|shakafalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakafalnkroshĂ«|goshakafalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakafalroshĂ«|gokishakafalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakafalromu|shakafalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakafalnkromu|goshakafalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakafalromu|gokishakafalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakafalmunĂŒ|shakafalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakafalnkmunĂŒ|goshakafalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakafalmunĂŒ|gokishakafalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakafalmushĂ«|shakafalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakafalnkmushĂ«|goshakafalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakafalmushĂ«|gokishakafalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakafalmuro|shakafalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakafalnkmuro|goshakafalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakafalmuro|gokishakafalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
